note: Nav consistency hotfix: index.html and sost-geaspirit.html now render the nav identical to the rest of the website. index.html: removed the bespoke .nav-convergencex / .nav-popc-dex CSS classes I had added and switched the markup to the same inline-styled anchors used by the other 48 pages (so the rainbow keyframe + flex behaviour comes from the same source on every page). sost-geaspirit.html: the page CSS only styled .nav-c, but the actual nav uses <div class="container"> — added a `nav .container` rule plus `.nav-logo` (font-family, font-size 26px, letter-spacing 3px) and `.nav-logo .brand-sost` (red) so the brand wordmark and flex layout match Materials Engine / AI Engine. No content change. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
